name: Barbecue Sauce - Norine Juenger - Lenzburg
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine salt, paprika, mustard, chili powder, and cayenne pepper in a saucepan.
2. Add tomato sauce, brown sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and chopped green onion tops to the pan.
3. Stir everything together until well combined.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
5. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
7. This recipe makes approximately 2 1/2 cups of barbecue sauce.
